author: Mike Ferguson
name: EvoNAS - (in progress)
blurb: Non-record submission documenting EvoNAS (genome.py / evolve.py): joint search over architecture, optimizer, fake-QAT, recurrence/traversal/sharing, then MLX training of the mark3_run champion. Submitted model weights are int6+zlib from apply_gptq.py (~14.8 MB, under 16 MB cap); val_bpb below is full-val on that artifact. Training also emits int8+zlib (~18.6 MB, over cap) for comparison—see README.
notes: Primary score and size: int6+zlib (apply_gptq.py). bytes_model_int8_zlib is the train_gpt_mlx.py export at end of train.log—not the submitted bundle. train_gpt.py in this folder is the repo CUDA snapshot required for submission layout.
